name: Alaskan Blueberry Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: but frozen would work as well)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium mixing bowl, blend together 1-1/2 cups flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, oil, milk, egg and 1 cup blueberries. Beat thoroughly for 30 seconds.
2. Spread the mixture in a greased round 9x1-1/2-inch pan or an 8x8x2-inch pan.
3. In another bowl, combine 1/3 cup flour, brown sugar, cinnamon and butter.
4. Sprinkle the mixture over the batter and top with the remaining berries.
5. Bake in a 375 degree oven for 25 to 30 minutes, until done. Do not overbake.
6. Serve warm with butter or honey. Serves 8.
